values.value: A small business owner applying for a line of credit, mid-application, with clear cross-sell to merchant services.

A small business owner (bakery, 12 employees) applied online for a $150K line of credit. Uploaded 2 years of tax returns. Story: demonstrate approval speed + cross-sell merchant services + business credit card.

{"persona":{"First_Name__c":"Maria","Last_Name__c":"Rodriguez","Title__c":"Owner","Company__c":"Sunrise Bakery","Customer_ID__c":"RB-24417","Segment__c":"SMB Line of Credit Applicant","Lifecycle_Stage__c":"Nurturing Lead","LTV__c":45000,"Propensity__c":"High","Engagement_Score__c":81,"Engagement_Label__c":"Application In Flight","Risk_Tier__c":"Medium","Badge_Text__c":"Application Pending","Suggested_Opener__c":"Hi Maria, thanks for submitting your tax returns — everything looks great and I expect approval within 24 hours. While we finalize, I want to make sure you have the right tools for daily operations too.","Intent_Summary__c":"Maria applied online for a $150K line of credit for Sunrise Bakery and uploaded 2 years of business tax returns this morning. Actively engaging with our approval status portal.","Key_Context__c":"12-employee bakery with $1.4M annual revenue. Currently uses a competing bank for payroll. Strong candidate for merchant services and business credit card bundle.","Open_Likelihood__c":85,"Click_Likelihood__c":68,"Unsubscribe_Risk__c":5},"insights":[{"Title__c":"Merchant Services Bundle","Category__c":"Cross-Sell","Why_This_Suggestion__c":"Retail SMBs approved for a line of credit have a 45% attach rate on merchant services when offered within 48 hours of approval.","CTA_Label__c":"Send Bundle Offer","Sort_Order__c":1},{"Title__c":"Business Credit Card","Category__c":"Cross-Sell","Why_This_Suggestion__c":"Sunrise Bakery has $8K/mo in supplier spend visible from cash flow statements. A business credit card would earn ~$1,900/yr in rebates.","CTA_Label__c":"Offer Card","Sort_Order__c":2}],"activities":[{"Type__c":"Doc","Title__c":"Uploaded 2023 & 2024 Tax Returns","Description__c":"Business tax returns uploaded via the small business application portal.","Timestamp_Label__c":"This morning","Icon__c":"utility:upload","Sort_Order__c":1},{"Type__c":"Web","Title__c":"Checked Application Status","Description__c":"Visited application status portal 3 times today.","Timestamp_Label__c":"Today","Icon__c":"utility:world","Sort_Order__c":2}],"journeys":[{"Journey_Name__c":"SMB Application Journey","Business_Unit__c":"Retail","Status__c":"Active"}],"recipe":{"leftRail":[{"component":"demoUnifiedProfileHeader"}],"center":[{"component":"demoAgentforceBrief"},{"component":"demoCrossSellInsights"}],"rightRail":[{"component":"demoActivityTimeline"},{"component":"demoActiveJourneyTracker"}]}}
